title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer cannot log in to their account even after resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps getting declined.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address still shows the old city even after updating it.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but still has not received it.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving OTP codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer gets an upload failed error while updating profile picture.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Issue
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal but the toggle is disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but did not receive a confirmation email.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Password reset link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Checkout Page Not Loading
description: Customer reports that the checkout page stays blank.

title: Product Search Not Working
description: Search results are not showing for any keywords.

title: Shipping Address Not Saving
description: Customer tries to update shipping address but changes are not saved.

title: Notification Emails Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving notification emails for account updates.
